query:
ALTER TABLE game_agents 
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS gather_power INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 20,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS forge_power INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 20,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS carry_weight INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 20,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS refine_power INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 20,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS treasure_hunting INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 20,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS heal_power INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 20,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS magic_attack INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 20,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS hit_rate INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 20,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS equipped_necklace VARCHAR(100),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS equipped_amulet VARCHAR(100);
